---
title: "Explore the data"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* The site theme constrains main.content to a 760px article column,
     and Quarto's column-page caps at ~1170px. Dashboard needs the full
     viewport. Override both, scoped to this page only. */
  main.content,
  main.content.column-page,
  #quarto-content,
  div.quarto-container.page-layout-full {
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
  }
  /* Hide auto-generated Quarto title block; we render our own .dash-header */
  .quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }
  /* Stop the body's "starred parchment" background from showing through
     in the gaps between dashboard sections; give the dashboard its own
     solid cream-pale field. */
  body { background-color: #ECEEF1; background-image: none !important; }
</style>
```


```{=html}
<div class="dash-header">
  <div class="kicker">An interactive companion to the audit</div>
  <h1>The audit, on your terms.</h1>
  <p class="dash-deck">Pick a variable, the demographics you want to compare, and a year range. Four chart panels respond to your choices simultaneously: a time series, a decade heatmap, a latest-year ranking, and a year-over-year change view.</p>
</div>

<section class="dash-controls" aria-label="Dashboard controls">
  <div class="dash-control">
    <label for="dash-item">Variable</label>
    <select id="dash-item"></select>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-control">
    <label>Demographics</label>
    <div id="dash-demographics" class="dash-checks"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-control dash-range">
    <label>Years</label>
    <div class="dash-range-inputs">
      <input type="number" id="dash-year-from" min="1970" max="2025" value="1970" step="1">
      <span class="dash-range-dash">to</span>
      <input type="number" id="dash-year-to" min="1970" max="2025" value="2025" step="1">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-control">
    <label>Transformation</label>
    <select id="dash-transform">
      <option value="raw">Raw values</option>
      <option value="indexed">Indexed to first year (= 100)</option>
      <option value="ratio_wm">Ratio to white men</option>
      <option value="gap_wm">Gap from white men</option>
      <option value="yoy">Year-over-year % change</option>
    </select>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="dash-grid" aria-label="Dashboard charts">
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>Over time</h3>
    <div id="dash-line" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>By decade</h3>
    <div id="dash-heatmap" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>Latest year, ranked</h3>
    <div id="dash-bar" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>Cumulative change since the first year</h3>
    <div id="dash-change" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>Slope: first year vs last year</h3>
    <div id="dash-slope" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-panel">
    <h3>Gap from white men, latest year</h3>
    <div id="dash-diverging" class="dash-fig"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="dash-summary">
  <div id="dash-summary-text" class="dash-summary-text"></div>
</section>

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function() {
  const PALETTE = {
    ink: '#14233D', ink_soft: '#36456A',
    cream: '#ECEEF1', cream_pale: '#F4F5F7',
    rule: '#D8CFB8',
    flag_navy: '#1B3D6B', flag_red: '#9C2C3C',
    gold: '#B68B3E', gold_pale: '#D8B978',
    flag_red_pale: '#C46A6E', sage: '#7C8A6E',
  };

  fetch('interactive/explorer_data.json').then(r => r.json()).then(D => {
    const itemSel = document.getElementById('dash-item');
    const demEl = document.getElementById('dash-demographics');
    const yrFrom = document.getElementById('dash-year-from');
    const yrTo = document.getElementById('dash-year-to');
    const transformSel = document.getElementById('dash-transform');

    D.items.forEach(it => {
      const o = document.createElement('option');
      o.value = it.key; o.textContent = it.label; itemSel.appendChild(o);
    });

    const defaultDems = new Set(['white_men','white_women','black_men','black_women','hispanic_men','hispanic_women']);
    D.demographics.forEach(d => {
      const wrap = document.createElement('label');
      wrap.innerHTML = `<input type="checkbox" value="${d.key}" ${defaultDems.has(d.key)?'checked':''}>` +
        `<span class="dash-swatch" style="background:${d.color}"></span>${d.label}`;
      demEl.appendChild(wrap);
    });

    const sel = () => ({
      item: itemSel.value,
      dems: Array.from(demEl.querySelectorAll('input:checked')).map(x => x.value),
      yFrom: +yrFrom.value, yTo: +yrTo.value,
      transform: transformSel.value,
    });

    const recsFor = (item, dem, yMin, yMax) =>
      D.records.filter(r => r.item === item && r.demographic === dem && r.year >= yMin && r.year <= yMax)
               .sort((a,b) => a.year - b.year);

    const fmt = (n, dec=0) => n == null ? '—' : n.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: dec});

    function transformSeries(rows, transform, wmByYear) {
      if (!rows.length) return rows.map(r => ({...r, v: r.hours}));
      if (transform === 'raw') return rows.map(r => ({...r, v: r.hours}));
      if (transform === 'indexed') {
        const base = rows[0].hours;
        return rows.map(r => ({...r, v: base ? (r.hours / base) * 100 : null}));
      }
      if (transform === 'ratio_wm') {
        return rows.map(r => {
          const wm = wmByYear[r.year];
          return {...r, v: wm ? r.hours / wm : null};
        });
      }
      if (transform === 'gap_wm') {
        return rows.map(r => {
          const wm = wmByYear[r.year];
          return {...r, v: wm != null ? r.hours - wm : null};
        });
      }
      if (transform === 'yoy') {
        return rows.map((r, i) => {
          const prev = rows[i - 1];
          return {...r, v: prev && prev.hours ? ((r.hours - prev.hours) / prev.hours) * 100 : null};
        });
      }
      return rows.map(r => ({...r, v: r.hours}));
    }

    function yLabel(itemMeta, transform) {
      if (transform === 'indexed') return 'Indexed to first year (= 100)';
      if (transform === 'ratio_wm') return 'Ratio to white men';
      if (transform === 'gap_wm')   return 'Gap from white men';
      if (transform === 'yoy')      return 'Year-over-year % change';
      return itemMeta.label;
    }

    const baseLayout = (title, yLab, extras={}) => Object.assign({
      title: {text: title, font:{family:'Cormorant Garamond, serif', size: 18, color: PALETTE.ink}},
      font: {family:'Inter, sans-serif', size: 11, color: PALETTE.ink},
      paper_bgcolor: PALETTE.cream_pale, plot_bgcolor: PALETTE.cream_pale,
      xaxis: {gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft, tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10}},
      yaxis: {title:{text: yLab, font:{size: 10, color: PALETTE.ink_soft}},
              gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft, tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10}},
      margin: {l: 70, r: 20, t: 50, b: 50},
      showlegend: false,
    }, extras);

    function update() {
      const s = sel();
      const itemMeta = D.items.find(x => x.key === s.item);
      const wmRows = recsFor(s.item, 'white_men', s.yFrom, s.yTo);
      const wmByYear = Object.fromEntries(wmRows.map(r => [r.year, r.hours]));

      // ---------- Panel 1: Time series line ----------
      {
        const traces = s.dems.map(dem => {
          const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === dem);
          const rows = transformSeries(recsFor(s.item, dem, s.yFrom, s.yTo), s.transform, wmByYear);
          return {
            x: rows.map(r => r.year),
            y: rows.map(r => r.v),
            mode: 'lines',
            name: meta.label,
            line: {color: meta.color, width: 2.4},
            hovertemplate: `<b>${meta.label}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:,.2f}<extra></extra>`,
          };
        });
        const refShape = (s.transform === 'ratio_wm') ?
          {type:'line', xref:'paper', x0:0, x1:1, y0:1, y1:1, line:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, width:1, dash:'dot'}}
          : (s.transform === 'gap_wm' || s.transform === 'yoy') ?
          {type:'line', xref:'paper', x0:0, x1:1, y0:0, y1:0, line:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, width:1, dash:'dot'}}
          : null;
        Plotly.react('dash-line', traces,
          baseLayout(itemMeta.label, yLabel(itemMeta, s.transform),
                     {showlegend: true, legend: {orientation:'h', y:-0.18, x:0.5, xanchor:'center', font:{size:10}},
                      shapes: refShape ? [refShape] : []}),
          {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Panel 2: Heatmap by decade ----------
      {
        const decades = [];
        const z = []; const text = [];
        const yLabels = s.dems.map(k => D.demographics.find(x => x.key === k).label);
        const decStart = Math.floor(s.yFrom / 10) * 10;
        const decEnd = Math.floor(s.yTo / 10) * 10;
        for (let d = decStart; d <= decEnd; d += 10) decades.push(`${d}s`);
        s.dems.forEach(dem => {
          const row = []; const trow = [];
          for (let d = decStart; d <= decEnd; d += 10) {
            const dEnd = Math.min(d + 9, s.yTo);
            const dStart = Math.max(d, s.yFrom);
            const rows = transformSeries(recsFor(s.item, dem, dStart, dEnd), s.transform, wmByYear);
            const valid = rows.map(r => r.v).filter(v => v != null);
            if (valid.length) {
              const avg = valid.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / valid.length;
              row.push(avg);
              trow.push(avg.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: avg < 10 ? 2 : 0}));
            } else { row.push(null); trow.push('n/a'); }
          }
          z.push(row); text.push(trow);
        });
        const allValid = z.flat().filter(v => v != null);
        const zmin = allValid.length ? Math.min(...allValid) : 0;
        const zmax = allValid.length ? Math.max(...allValid) : 1;
        Plotly.react('dash-heatmap', [{
          type: 'heatmap', x: decades, y: yLabels, z, text, texttemplate: '%{text}',
          colorscale: [[0, PALETTE.cream_pale], [0.5, PALETTE.gold_pale], [1, PALETTE.flag_red_pale]],
          colorbar: {tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 9}, thickness: 10, len: 0.8},
          hovertemplate: '<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x}: %{z:,.2f}<extra></extra>',
          zmin, zmax,
          textfont: {family:'Inter', size: 10, color: PALETTE.ink},
        }],
        baseLayout(`${itemMeta.label}, by decade`, '',
          {xaxis:{side:'top', tickfont:{size:10, color: PALETTE.ink_soft}, gridcolor:'rgba(0,0,0,0)'},
           yaxis:{tickfont:{size:10, color: PALETTE.ink_soft}, gridcolor:'rgba(0,0,0,0)', autorange:'reversed'},
           margin:{l:120, r:30, t:55, b:30}}),
        {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Panel 3: Latest year ranked bar ----------
      {
        const yr = s.yTo;
        const rows = s.dems.map(dem => {
          const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === dem);
          const rs = transformSeries(recsFor(s.item, dem, s.yFrom, s.yTo), s.transform, wmByYear);
          let last = null;
          for (let i = rs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) if (rs[i].v != null) { last = rs[i]; break; }
          return {dem, label: meta.label, color: meta.color, v: last ? last.v : null, year: last ? last.year : yr};
        }).filter(r => r.v != null).sort((a,b) => b.v - a.v);

        Plotly.react('dash-bar', [{
          type: 'bar', orientation: 'h',
          x: rows.map(r => r.v),
          y: rows.map(r => r.label),
          marker: {color: rows.map(r => r.color), line: {width: 0}},
          text: rows.map(r => r.v.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: r.v < 10 ? 2 : 0})),
          textposition: 'outside',
          textfont: {color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10},
          hovertemplate: '<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x:,.2f} (%{customdata})<extra></extra>',
          customdata: rows.map(r => r.year),
        }],
        baseLayout(`Latest available, by demographic`, yLabel(itemMeta, s.transform),
          {xaxis:{gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft, tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10}},
           yaxis:{tickfont:{size:10, color: PALETTE.ink}, autorange:'reversed', gridcolor:'rgba(0,0,0,0)'},
           margin:{l:120, r:60, t:50, b:50}}),
        {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Panel 4: Cumulative % change since first year ----------
      {
        const traces = s.dems.map(dem => {
          const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === dem);
          const rows = recsFor(s.item, dem, s.yFrom, s.yTo);
          if (!rows.length) return null;
          const base = rows[0].hours;
          const xs = rows.map(r => r.year);
          const ys = rows.map(r => base ? ((r.hours - base) / base) * 100 : null);
          return {x: xs, y: ys, mode: 'lines', name: meta.label,
                  line:{color: meta.color, width: 2.2},
                  hovertemplate: `<b>${meta.label}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:+.1f}%<extra></extra>`};
        }).filter(Boolean);
        Plotly.react('dash-change', traces,
          baseLayout(`Cumulative change since ${s.yFrom}`, 'Percent change',
            {showlegend: false, yaxis:{ticksuffix:'%', gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft, tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10}},
             shapes: [{type:'line', xref:'paper', x0:0, x1:1, y0:0, y1:0, line:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, width:1, dash:'dot'}}]}),
          {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Panel 5: Slope chart, first year vs last year ----------
      {
        const traces = [];
        const slopeRows = s.dems.map(dem => {
          const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === dem);
          const rs = recsFor(s.item, dem, s.yFrom, s.yTo);
          if (rs.length < 2) return null;
          const first = rs[0], last = rs[rs.length - 1];
          return {dem, label: meta.label, color: meta.color,
                  yStart: first.hours, yEnd: last.hours,
                  xStart: first.year, xEnd: last.year};
        }).filter(Boolean);

        slopeRows.forEach(r => {
          traces.push({
            x: [r.xStart, r.xEnd],
            y: [r.yStart, r.yEnd],
            mode: 'lines+markers+text',
            name: r.label,
            line: {color: r.color, width: 2.4},
            marker: {color: r.color, size: 8, line: {color: PALETTE.cream_pale, width: 1.5}},
            text: ['', r.label],
            textposition: 'middle right',
            textfont: {family: 'Inter', size: 10, color: PALETTE.ink},
            cliponaxis: false,
            hovertemplate: `<b>${r.label}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>`,
          });
        });
        Plotly.react('dash-slope', traces,
          baseLayout(`${itemMeta.label}: ${slopeRows[0]?.xStart || s.yFrom} → ${slopeRows[0]?.xEnd || s.yTo}`,
                     itemMeta.label,
            {xaxis: {tickvals: [slopeRows[0]?.xStart || s.yFrom, slopeRows[0]?.xEnd || s.yTo],
                     range: [(slopeRows[0]?.xStart || s.yFrom) - 1, (slopeRows[0]?.xEnd || s.yTo) + 12],
                     gridcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)', linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft,
                     tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 11}},
             yaxis: {gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft,
                     tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10},
                     title:{text: itemMeta.label, font:{size: 10, color: PALETTE.ink_soft}},
                     rangemode: 'tozero'},
             margin: {l: 70, r: 130, t: 50, b: 50},
             showlegend: false}),
          {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Panel 6: Diverging gap from white men, latest year ----------
      {
        const wmLast = wmRows.length ? wmRows[wmRows.length - 1] : null;
        let rows = [];
        if (wmLast) {
          rows = s.dems.filter(d => d !== 'white_men').map(dem => {
            const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === dem);
            const rs = recsFor(s.item, dem, s.yFrom, s.yTo);
            if (!rs.length) return null;
            const last = rs[rs.length - 1];
            return {dem, label: meta.label, color: meta.color,
                    gap: last.hours - wmLast.hours, year: last.year};
          }).filter(Boolean).sort((a, b) => b.gap - a.gap);
        }

        const colors = rows.map(r => r.gap > 0 ? PALETTE.flag_red : PALETTE.flag_navy);
        Plotly.react('dash-diverging', [{
          type: 'bar', orientation: 'h',
          x: rows.map(r => r.gap),
          y: rows.map(r => r.label),
          marker: {color: colors, line: {width: 0}},
          text: rows.map(r => (r.gap > 0 ? '+' : '') + r.gap.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: r.gap < 10 && r.gap > -10 ? 2 : 0})),
          textposition: 'outside',
          textfont: {color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10},
          hovertemplate: '<b>%{y}</b><br>Gap from white men in %{customdata}: %{x:,.2f}<extra></extra>',
          customdata: rows.map(r => r.year),
        }],
        baseLayout(`Difference from white men (${rows[0]?.year || s.yTo})`, 'Gap (positive = more than white men)',
          {xaxis: {gridcolor: PALETTE.rule, linecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft,
                   tickfont:{color: PALETTE.ink_soft, size: 10},
                   zeroline: true, zerolinecolor: PALETTE.ink_soft, zerolinewidth: 1.5},
           yaxis: {tickfont:{size: 10, color: PALETTE.ink}, gridcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
                   autorange: 'reversed'},
           margin: {l: 120, r: 60, t: 50, b: 50}}),
        {responsive: true, displayModeBar: false});
      }

      // ---------- Summary ----------
      const sumEl = document.getElementById('dash-summary-text');
      const latestRows = s.dems.map(d => {
        const meta = D.demographics.find(x => x.key === d);
        const rs = recsFor(s.item, d, s.yFrom, s.yTo);
        return rs.length ? {label: meta.label, hours: rs[rs.length-1].hours, year: rs[rs.length-1].year} : null;
      }).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b) => b.hours - a.hours);
      if (latestRows.length >= 2) {
        const top = latestRows[0], bot = latestRows[latestRows.length-1];
        sumEl.textContent = `In ${top.year}, ${top.label} sit at ${fmt(top.hours, 2)} for ${itemMeta.label}; ${bot.label} sit at ${fmt(bot.hours, 2)}. The gap between the highest and the lowest is ${fmt(top.hours - bot.hours, 2)}.`;
      } else if (latestRows.length === 1) {
        sumEl.textContent = `In ${latestRows[0].year}, ${latestRows[0].label}: ${fmt(latestRows[0].hours, 2)} for ${itemMeta.label}.`;
      } else { sumEl.textContent = ''; }
    }

    [itemSel, transformSel].forEach(el => el.addEventListener('change', update));
    [yrFrom, yrTo].forEach(el => el.addEventListener('change', update));
    demEl.addEventListener('change', update);
    update();
  });
})();
</script>
```
